macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Arbitrum Freezes Over 30,000 ETH After KelpDAO Exploit
items.summary: Arbitrum Security Council froze over 30,000 ETH following a KelpDAO hack to mitigate losses. This urgent action highlights ongoing security risks in the DeFi ecosystem.

items.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $77K Triggering Panic Selling, Now at $77,629
items.summary: Bitcoin traded between $77,441 and $79,473 over the past 24 hours, currently down 0.67% to $77,629 amid consolidation and security concerns. It briefly recovered to $78,000 after Iran denied resignation claims.

items.title: XRP Surges to $1.43 on Increased Whale Activity
items.summary: XRP topped $1.43 due to strong buyer interest from whale accumulation. Markets buzz with predictions of significant surges for XRP alongside Ethereum and PENGU.

items.title: Solana Price Slips 3.61% to $84.80 Amid Consolidation
items.summary: Solana dropped to $84.80, down 3.61% in the past 24 hours, while consolidating between $82-$93 with bulls targeting $500 long-term. Traders watch for key breakout.

items.title: Aave Suspends rsETH Reserve Operations on Ethereum and Arbitrum
items.summary: Aave halted rsETH reserve operations across Ethereum and Arbitrum networks. This move addresses potential risks in the lending protocol amid recent exploits.

items.title: IRS Warns of AI-Fueled Surge in Crypto Fraud Schemes
items.summary: IRS investigators report AI is driving a rise in cryptocurrency scams, with the FBI noting billions lost to cyber theft last year, over half in crypto. This regulatory alert underscores growing fraud risks.

items.title: PENGU Predicted for 30% Rebound After 90% Plunge
items.summary: PENGU token fell 90% since launch, but analyst Fuel forecasts a 30% pump if key level breaks. Positive sentiment builds alongside XRP and Ethereum surge predictions.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Diablo IV Lord of Hatred Expansion Review Highlights New Content
items.summary: The Lord of Hatred expansion for Diablo IV features a 10-hour campaign, new zone, two new classes, and enhanced end-game systems, addressing previous criticisms and positioning the game strongly.

items.title: Bungie Teases Return of God Tier Hand Cannons in Destiny 2 Iron Banner
items.summary: In the latest TWAB on April 23, Bungie announced the return of two unobtainable god tier hand cannons for the next Iron Banner event, alongside a new community challenge, Armor 3.0, stats overhaul, and a new portal leading to the Star Wars-themed Renegades expansion.

items.title: The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Closed Beta Impressions from Owlcat Games
items.summary: Hands-on previews of The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, a third-person action RPG, praise its tactical combat, squad-based gameplay, deep exploration, and branching paths, drawing Mass Effect comparisons while noting areas for improvement like Belter accents.

items.title: Osiris Reborn Preview: Potential Next Mass Effect from Owlcat Games
items.summary: Owlcat Games' The Expanse: Osiris Reborn shows promise in its third-person action RPG format with tactical elements and immersive world-building in a closed beta.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Intel Reports Strong Q1 Results with Revenue Beat and Upbeat Q2 Forecast
items.summary: Intel's Q1 revenue rose 7% year-over-year to $13.58 billion, surpassing estimates of $12.42 billion, and the company forecasted Q2 revenue and adjusted EPS above expectations, driving shares up over 15% after hours.

items.title: Pudu Robotics Raises $150M at Over $1.5B Valuation
items.summary: Shenzhen-based Pudu Robotics, a maker of commercial service robots, secured approximately $150 million in funding, bringing total funding to over $300 million and pushing its valuation above $1.5 billion.

items.title: DJI’s Avata 360 Drone Receives FCC Approval Ahead of U.S. Foreign Drone Ban
items.summary: DJI’s Avata 360 drone gained FCC approval just before a U.S. ban on new foreign-made drones took effect, potentially allowing continued sales amid restrictions.

items.title: Netgear Exempted from U.S. WiFi Router Ban
items.summary: Netgear has received an exemption from the U.S. ban on certain WiFi routers, enabling it to continue operations despite new restrictions on foreign-made networking equipment.

items.title: U.S. Government Bans New Foreign-Made Drones
items.summary: The U.S. government implemented a ban on new foreign-made drones, impacting the drone market and prompting approvals and exemptions for specific models like DJI’s.
